phase: Mauritius Civic Research & Awareness (hub metadata only)
notices: This JSON is doctrine and taxonomy only. It is not legal advice, not a complaint filing service, and not a substitute for licensed counsel or official channels.
All numeric facts (wages, indices, statutes) MUST be anchored to dated official sources before any public wording is upgraded from provisional to affirmed.
Do not cite this hub registry as authoritative for Mauritius law; defer to Gazette, statutes, and government portals.

source_ranks.A: Official statutes, Gazette, courts, Statistics Mauritius publications, ministries (dated retrieval).
source_ranks.B: Peer-reviewed studies, reputable universities, UN/ILO/OHCHR explanatory pages where not replacing national law.
source_ranks.C: Professional journalism with bylines and corrections policy (still verify primary sources).
source_ranks.D: First-person testimony with informed consent and safety review (never minors; never coerced).
source_ranks.E: Unverified social media or rumor — NEVER state as fact; use only as prompts for verification.

source_status_hints.needs_verification: Default for new ingest; provisional public wording only.
source_status_hints.verified_official_neutral_language: Backed by Rank A excerpts or official tables with dates.
source_status_hints.legal_or_ethics_human_review_required: Publish or widen distribution only after AMK/legal/human gate.
source_status_hints.blocked_escalatory_content: Must not ship; revise or discard.

lawful_navigator_hints: Labour grievances: route to Mauritius Ministry of Labour, HR institutions, and lawful representation where applicable.
Discrimination: Equal Opportunities Commission and related statutes — use official portals and complaint forms.
Public authority conduct: lawful ombudsman-type routes and statutes as applicable.
International treaty communications: OHCHR / treaty-body guidance pages — procedural, not automatic relief.
Assembly and association are constitutionally protected subject to lawful limitations — plan peaceful, lawful events only.
